title: Java_Broken.jar
description: Horror mod that generates events in your minecraft (alpha mode, will have MANY more updates)
body:
This horror mod is inspired by The Broken Script (it can work as a complement to TBS) and also by Aware and Concious. It adds 10 total events to your Minecraft (in the latest version of the mod). This mod adds several entities to your game that can appear naturally or via events. This mod also adds commands and a consciousness system that decreases every 30 seconds. When consciousness reaches 1, all game events will occur simultaneously. When you start a world, you receive medicine and a knife that can be used to obtain food. The medicine is used to return your consciousness to 10 (default). In this mod, you can get an item that simulates your Java file, which, when consumed, can spawn a creature called Java Broken. If your goal is to add random and crazy events, entities, items, and jumpscares, this is the perfect mod for you.

WARNING:

This mod is not intended to insult any mental disorder.

If you have photovisible epilepsy, DO NOT play this mod.

WHAT YOU NEED TO DO:

- When creating the world, leave cheats enabled in versions 1.0.3 Alpha and 1.0.0 Alpha.

THIS MOD WILL:

Kick you from the world

Crash your game

Instant blindness

Temporarily disable monster spawns in your world.

THE MOD IS IN ALPHA AND DOESN'T HAVE MANY FEATURES. (sorry for bugs)
